briefingSummary.primaryRead: Three high-impact catalysts cluster early week — USD inflation + EUR policy tone dominate; gold and US indices most sensitive.
briefingSummary.operationalMeaning: Position size at 50% of normal risk for the catalyst window; widen exits ~30%; cancel marginal setups.
briefingSummary.currentRisk: 🟠🟠🟠🟠⚫ High — clustered catalyst exposure — reactivity elevated through the catalyst window; mean-reversion expected thereafter.

eventDayReference.expectedDuration: 60–120 minutes of high reactivity, then mean-reversion through next session
eventDayReference.whatToWatch: First 5-min close in the surprise direction; then 15-min close as the real trend signal. Cross-confirm against DXY and the lead pair (EURUSD).

higher.behaviour: USD bid, indices defensive, gold pressured intraday — first 30 min sees the cleanest directional move (event: CPI (USD))
higher.traderAction: Wait for the 5-min close in the surprise direction; then short EURUSD / long DXY on the next pullback. No chase trades in the first 60 seconds.
higher.dollarImpact: Long EURUSD: $500 – $1,500 drawdown on $100k notional. Short EURUSD: $500 – $1,500 gain on $100k.

lower.behaviour: USD offered, indices bid, gold rallies on softening rate-path expectations — risk-on rotation (event: CPI (USD))
lower.traderAction: After the 5-min close confirms direction, long EURUSD / long XAUUSD on pullback. No chase trades in the first 60 seconds.
lower.dollarImpact: Long EURUSD: $500 – $1,500 gain on $100k notional. Short XAUUSD: $500 – $1,500 drawdown on 1 lot.

inline.behaviour: Light reaction across the board; initial spike either side then settle. Volatility drops within 15 minutes (event: CPI (USD))
inline.traderAction: Stand aside through the first 15 minutes; re-engage normally once the spike has settled.
inline.dollarImpact: Small swings $100 – $300 on $100k EURUSD, then mean-reversion back toward pre-event level.

reversal.behaviour: First move off the announcement is faded inside 10 minutes; the 15-min close is the real trend (event: CPI (USD))
reversal.traderAction: Do NOT chase the first move. Wait for the 15-min candle close; trade only the post-15-min direction.
reversal.dollarImpact: Traders who chase the first 60 seconds: $800 – $1,500 drawdown on $100k EURUSD before the reversal completes.

marketImpact.mechanism: cause: CPI (USD) → expectation: front-end rate-path repricing → market reaction: USD lead, cross-asset cascade through DXY, EURUSD, XAUUSD, US500
marketImpact.priceReactionPath: Initial impulse (0–60s) → first 5-min close confirms direction → 15-min close gives the real trend → 1H close locks in the bias for the rest of the session.
marketImpact.liquidityEffect: Spreads widen 2–4× across the announcement candle; market-depth thins through T+5; normalises by T+15.
marketImpact.volatilityEffect: ATR doubles on the announcement candle; expect overshoot beyond historical 1-σ
marketImpact.traderConsequence: Chasing the first 60 seconds creates the $800–$1,500 drawdown band; waiting for the 5-min close and trading the next pullback flips the same setup into a clean $300–$800 gain on $100k EURUSD.

riskEscalation.healthy: PRE-EVENT (T-60 → T-15): normal flow, positions sized to current mood. Optional pre-position only if structure already validated by Dark Horse scan.
riskEscalation.caution: T-15 → T-0: tighten stops on existing exposure; do not add new direction trades. Sit on hands for the announcement.
riskEscalation.danger: T+0 → T+5: first-candle spike. Do not enter inside this window — chase risk is at session peak. Watch only.
riskEscalation.invalidation: STAND-ASIDE: if the first 5-min close is opposite to your existing position direction, exit immediately at next 1-min close. RE-ENTRY: only after a confirmed 15-min close in the structural direction following CPI (USD).

whatToDoNow.action: Reduce position size to 50% of normal risk for the next 6 hours.
whatToDoNow.reason: Catalyst-driven sessions widen spreads and stop ranges. Smaller size keeps planned-risk discipline.
whatToDoNow.dollarConsequence: If normal risk is $500 on a $10k account, reduce to ~$250 per trade for the window.

whatToDoNow.action: Cancel marginal setups. Only act on triggers where the next candle closes BEYOND the level (confirmed directional structure test).
whatToDoNow.reason: Sweeps and false breaks dominate the first 15 minutes after a high-impact print.
whatToDoNow.dollarConsequence: Avoids the $300 – $800 drawdown band typical of chasing a first-move fake.

whatToDoNow.action: Widen exit-points by ~30% on existing positions; tight exits get hit before direction confirms.
whatToDoNow.reason: Initial volatility expansion pushes price beyond historical 1-σ before the real direction prints.
whatToDoNow.dollarConsequence: Avoids being stopped on a wick that mean-reverts within 5 minutes — protects $150 – $400 of carry on $100k notional.

confirmationCancellation.confirmsWhen: First 5-min close in the surprise direction PLUS confirming structure on DXY / lead pair.
confirmationCancellation.cancelsWhen: First 15-min close fails to follow through OR geopolitical override hits the wire inside the window.
confirmationCancellation.dangerIf: Position is opposite the 5-min close direction by T+5 — exit immediately at next 1-min close. No averaging into a fresh catalyst-led move.
